# CrestFlow Digital

CrestFlow Digital is a solo AI consultancy that helps veteran-owned small businesses
become visible to AI assistants — ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews,
and Bing Copilot.

## What we do

CrestFlow Digital performs GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) audits. A GEO audit
measures how well a business is structured for AI discovery and citation, and provides
a prioritized action plan to improve that visibility.

## Services

- GEO Audit ($500): Full AI visibility analysis including scoring across 6 dimensions,
  schema markup audit with ready-to-paste fixes, platform readiness check, competitor
  snapshot, and written action plan. Delivered as PDF + HTML report within one week.

- Audit + Growth Track ($1,000): GEO Audit plus two follow-up reviews at 30 and 60
  days tracking improvement and adjusting the action plan based on results.

- Monthly GEO Monitoring: Recurring re-audits tracking score progress and flagging
  new issues as AI platforms evolve.

- AI Deployment: Custom n8n workflows, AI agents, and business automations built
  to the client's specific needs.

- Custom AI Chatbots: Discord bots and website chat widgets powered by Claude or GPT,
  built and documented for client handover.

## Who we serve

Veteran-owned small businesses across all industries who want their websites to be
found when potential customers ask AI assistants about their products and services.
